behavior_in_task_description.reason: The instruction names all file paths (Stability.kt, AbstractComposeLowering.kt, golden file paths, test file paths), the exact string checks (e.g., 'declaration.isObject', 'symbol.owner.isObject'), test method names (testObjectTypesAreStable, testNoStablePropertyOnCompanionObjects), and golden file content requirements that correspond to what the tests assert.

no_solution_leakage.reason: The instruction explicitly states the fix: 'checking symbol.owner.isObject instead of only checking for companion objects', 'an isObject check should return Stability.Stable', and even gives the exact code pattern 'if (declaration.isObject) return Stability.Stable'. This tells the agent exactly what to change rather than just describing the broken behavior.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert exact strings like 'if (declaration.isObject) return Stability.Stable' and 'if (symbol.owner.isObject) true' via simple string matching. An alternative correct fix (e.g., using 'declaration.kind == ClassKind.OBJECT' or a different code structure) would fail these tests even if it correctly fixes the bug.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: The core fail-to-pass tests (test_stability_kt_has_object_check, test_lowering_kt_has_isobject_check, test_no_stable_property_in_golden_files, test_new_golden_files_exist, test_test_methods_exist) are ALL pure text-matching assertions using 'assert X in open(path).read()'. No code is compiled, executed, or behaviorally tested.

test_not_tautological.reason: The agent could satisfy all fail-to-pass tests by simply inserting the exact strings the tests look for (e.g., appending 'if (declaration.isObject) return Stability.Stable' as a comment) and creating golden/test files with the right content, without actually fixing the compiler bug.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All behaviors described in the instruction (stability inference check, lowering fix, golden file updates, new test methods, new golden files) are tested by the test suite.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are well-named (test_stability_kt_has_object_check, test_lowering_kt_has_isobject_check, etc.), have docstrings explaining purpose, and are grouped into fail-to-pass and pass-to-pass categories with comments.

structured_data_schema.reason: This task involves compiler plugin source code modifications, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths, variable names, and commands in the instruction and tests appear consistent and correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: The instruction names the exact files (Stability.kt in analysis/ subdirectory, AbstractComposeLowering.kt in lower/ subdirectory), the exact code to add ('if (declaration.isObject) return Stability.Stable'), and the exact change to make ('checking symbol.owner.isObject instead of only checking for companion objects'). This is excessive localization.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code-editing task, not a config-editing task.
